{{Infobox character
| name = Cynara
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Cynara Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Cynara is a queen and the original architect of her palace, which includes the [[Blue Room]] designed specifically to provide visual relief for returning Ragnarus [[Travelers]]. Once intended to inherit the throne due to her intelligence and determination, she suffered a traumatic accident in [[Asphodel]] involving [[Trees]] that fed upon her. This experience left her in a state of constant agony, as she remained conscious and partially aware of the world while being drained. Consequently, she became paranoid, delusional, and confined herself to her palace rooms. Despite these struggles and a perceived loss of her former power, she remains dedicated to her nation and is capable of engaging in bargains and offering political counsel.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cynara]] is described as mad.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cynara]] is paranoid, delusional, and trapped inside her palace rooms.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Cynara]] is [[Leah]]'s sister who had an accident in [[Asphodel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|In an attempt to halt [[Rhalia]]'s rampage, Cynara sought out dark weapons. She was later seen seated upon a carved wooden throne located within the antechamber of Ragnarus. Although [[Leah]] identifies her as an insane sister, Cynara made a sudden appearance amidst a red flash. During this manifestation, her dress was composed entirely of scarlet light.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] searched for dark weapons to stop [[Rhalia]]'s rampage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] sits on a carved wooden throne in the antechamber of Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] has an insane sister named [[Cynara]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] appeared in a red flash.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]]'s dress was made of scarlet light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Cynara searched for darker weapons to bring a stop to my rampage."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
